title: Berger Silk Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Berger Silk Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
